name: gemini.models.generate_content_stream
description: Gemini streaming. Captured 2026-05-19 from a real `gemini-flash-latest` stream of 'Count down from 3' — the live stream returned 2 chunks (first chunk: full text '3\n2\n1', second chunk: usage_metadata + responseId). The SDK patch tees the iterator and persists the assembled output. Chunks are individually persisted under `metadata.states` so the dashboard's StreamObservations strip surfaces chunk count + throughput; the consolidated candidates live at the top of `output` like a non-streamed call.

parts.text: Count down from 3, one number per line.
